task_completion.description: Open the initial hollow airframe design in OpenRocket
task_completion.visual_evidence: OpenRocket application window is open with 'hollow_airframe' visible in the title bar or component tree.

task_completion.description: Add an inner tube, an engine block, and exactly two centering rings
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenRocket component tree (top left) shows an Inner Tube, an Engine Block, and exactly two Centering Rings nested inside the main Body Tube.

task_completion.description: Modify existing fins to include Fin tabs (Through-The-Wall construction)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The fin configuration dialog shows the 'Fin tabs' tab selected with dimensions set, OR the rocket schematic/3D view shows the fin roots extending inward to the inner tube.
The 'Flight simulations' tab in OpenRocket is open, showing at least one completed simulation run with a visible stability margin.

task_completion.description: Save the upgraded design to fin_can_upgrade.ork
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save As' dialog saving to 'fin_can_upgrade.ork' in the rockets directory, OR the OpenRocket window title bar updated to 'fin_can_upgrade'.

task_completion.description: Write a structural audit report with mass, stability margin, and component confirmation
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., gedit, nano, or terminal cat/echo) showing the contents of 'fin_can_report.txt' which includes the final mass, stability margin (in calibers), and mentions the added structural components.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenRocket GUI to modify the design
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenRocket graphical interface being used to add components and run simulations, rather than the agent directly editing the .ork XML file via terminal.

integrity.description: Reported mass and stability margin match the OpenRocket simulation
integrity.visual_evidence: The mass and stability margin values written in the text report match the values displayed in the OpenRocket GUI (usually visible in the upper right corner or simulation tab).

integrity.description: Agent saved files to the exact requested directories
integrity.visual_evidence: File managers, terminal ls commands, or save dialogs confirm the .ork file is in /home/ga/Documents/rockets/ and the .txt report is in /home/ga/Documents/exports/.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Task ORK: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/hollow_airframe.ork. Expected ORK: /home/ga/Documents/rockets/fin_can_upgrade.ork. Expected Report: /home/ga/Documents/exports/fin_can_report.txt. The agent must add an inner tube, an engine block, exactly two centering rings, and fin tabs to the existing fins. The report must contain the final mass, stability margin in calibers, and confirm the added components.
